rows.label: xs33450110_MSG0010
rows.name:
We did it, mo!
We launched all the spears, mo~![ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs33450110_MSG0020
rows.name: With this, we'll have the upper hand in the battle against Void, won't we.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs33450110_MSG0030
rows.name: Yes, we won't fall behind this time.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs33450110_MSG0040
rows.name: We will defeat Void and take back the Ares's cores.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs33450110_MSG0050
rows.name: As soon as we're prepared, let's begin our counterattack.[ST:wait ]
